message:
feat(web): Add Setup wizard to sidebar navigation

- Add Setup nav item with Wand2 icon linking to /setup
- Complete Setup wizard page with:
  - ReadinessScore component showing detection progress
  - ToolCard for displaying tool status and install buttons
  - RecommendationsPanel for action suggestions
  - SetupSteps for wizard flow (detect, install, verify)
- useSetup hooks for API integration (readiness, install, verify)
- SetupSkeleton for loading states
- Skeleton tests for all page skeletons

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
